title: Hard-corecraft block
description: This is a block of the youtuber Hard-corecraft
body:
**HardcoreCraft Logo Block**

This unique block showcases the iconic logo of the popular YouTuber HardcoreCraft, perfect for fans and Minecraft builders who want to show their support for the channel. The block is a perfect blend of style and functionality, with a vibrant design that represents the HardcoreCraft brand.

**Crafting Recipe:**
- 1 Iron Ingot
- 1 Red Wool
- 1 Black Wool

When crafted, the HardcoreCraft Logo Block can be used as a decorative piece in your Minecraft world or as part of your custom builds. Its bold colors of red, black, and the metallic sheen of the iron give it a standout appearance. It’s a must-have for any true HardcoreCraft fan!
